mapper.sql: id, project_id, name, description, status, priority, assignee_id, reporter_id, start_date, due_date, estimated_hours, actual_hours, progress, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task ( project_id, name, description, status, priority, assignee_id, reporter_id, start_date, due_date, estimated_hours, actual_hours, progress, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{assigneeId}, #{reporterId}, #{startDate}, #{dueDate}, #{estimatedHours}, #{actualHours}, #{progress}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, reporter_id = #{reporterId}, start_date = #{startDate}, due_date = #{dueDate}, estimated_hours = #{estimatedHours}, actual_hours = #{actualHours}, progress = #{progress}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, p.name as project_name, u1.real_name as assignee_name, u2.real_name as reporter_name FROM task t LEFT JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u1 ON t.assignee_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON t.reporter_id = u2.id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.*, p.name as project_name, u1.real_name as assignee_name, u2.real_name as reporter_name FROM task t LEFT JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u1 ON t.assignee_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON t.reporter_id = u2.id WHERE t.assignee_id = #{assigneeId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as progress FROM task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY status
